center.name: 内尼日尔三角洲
center.summary: 内尼日尔三角洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括艾氏伯劳，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can be found in Mali in the Niger inland delta and on the Séno Plain and the Ivory Coast, mostly in Comoé National Park east to South Sudan and northern Uganda

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can be found in Mali in the Niger inland delta and on the Séno Plain and the Ivory Coast, mostly in Comoé National Park east to South Sudan and northern Uganda
